title: Lunch
why_this_song: Lunch by Billie Eilish (2024) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Tastes like she might be the one
And I could never get enough
I could buy her so much stuff
It's a craving, not a crush, huh
Tastes like she might be the one

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "girl" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "girl" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "lunch" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "lunch" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I could eat that girl for lunch
Baby, I think you were made for me
Oh my God, her skin's so clear

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Yeah, she dances on my tongue
Tastes like she might be the one
Now she's smilin' ear to ear

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Lunch" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Lunch"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Billie Eilish one question about "Lunch", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Billie Eilish sobre "Lunch", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Lunch" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Lunch" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Lunch" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Lunch" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?
